name: ubersicht-google-calendar
description: Übersicht widget that shows upcoming Google Calendar events

scripts.install-widget: pnpm run build && rm -rf "$HOME/Library/Application Support/Übersicht/widgets/calendar.widget" && cp -R calendar.widget "$HOME/Library/Application Support/Übersicht/widgets/"
scripts.build:release: bash -c 'set -a; [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a; pnpm run build'
scripts.auth:release: bash -c 'set -a; [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a; pnpm run auth'
scripts.package: pnpm run build && pnpm run test && zip -r ubersicht-google-calendar.widget.zip calendar.widget/index.jsx calendar.widget/lib calendar.widget/package.json -x '*.DS_Store'
